subcodes.first_line: O beloved of God among the desert-dwellers! Should God grant you a child, designate him 'Abdu'l-Bahá, and thus name him [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا احباء الله من الاعراب ان وهبکم الله من ولد لقبوه بعبدالبها و سموه
subcodes.subjects: @naming of children; of individuals, @prophecy and fulfillment
